textByHashes.a69d56d0eb4266fde5412cea349b18db660ef3fc: Get away from me you filthy grave robber.
textByHashes.7eb0f13dacd8ddbb913f16f378416136047f7ddc: Hello, adventurer. The High Priest says that you're here to help us.
textByHashes.6c498d7a480888a658637c5b2e99056b7dc1532d: Ah yes, it needs to be made from willow. Thing is, there's a small problem with that.
textByHashes.0106574721b7dcc9d4d10c77310cffa8a2c72b63: Wow, you're quick. I'm all out of willow, and due to the quarantine, I'm unable to leave the city to get more. However, the High Priest mentioned that a special exception has been made for you.
textByHashes.4876605c517619d98bb0715e0f1f753948475ade: Thank you. Now, just give me a moment...
textByHashes.3b50ecd9dfa4b5bd544b2fed680db986448ff393: I imagine the High Priest will be down in the pyramid by now. You should take that to him as soon as possible.
textByHashes.f5ce9e3a30819d23cb388fde717db87a78577cf3: Do you have that wood for me?
textByHashes.dfcbd1d5814dca478d1c56e671f3d5484a6ed5d9: I'll be here when you do.
textByHashes.b4fe4983f182fbcfd29b942674931dda8e61d839: Hello, adventurer. I'm still working on that symbol. Do you have something else you can do in the meantime?
textByHashes.e434eff7f325e12efee63b2123fc7c0ad219915f: Well you're probably best off doing that then. I'm sure I'll have it ready by the time you're done.
textByHashes.100e82a3dd95e49dd65cb61e1cc592b6a373d36d: Hello, adventurer. The symbol is all finished now.
textByHashes.18dd0fc969a3dc616ad7f45c7ba0a529f43df6e5: Hello. Have you given the symbol to the High Priest yet?
textByHashes.2c9f576178aa6316b36dfb0ea90243876be9a1ec: Well you should as soon as possible. He'll be down in the pyramid by now.
textByHashes.fb3ae560c382d6be91098602f9da14f157ac8d24: What? But I made it to exactly match the drawings from the High Priest. I can't believe this!
textByHashes.10cc8e439e20cfb9ce8dfbde1439615173fd7d18: Agh, you fool! Is stupidity the newest plague in town?
textByHashes.22fece817807a6641421174d89c19b474f461b60: Fine. Just give me a moment...
textByHashes.be0524928582cc0128f34cd57f8dce10b760c277: There we go. All done. Try not to lose this one.
textByHashes.ea1fd406e8d1a4b10963a03a3243e6ac3134a8ea: Now you should take that to the High Priest as soon as possible. He'll be down in the pyramid by now.
textByHashes.18fec885cd8ed6972f878aee46151110c4c25f31: Not too bad. Still, I hope we can get rid of these spots soon.
textByHashes.6a04db189e42d85a2f9d907eafc6e4ec7d508fee: The embalmer has been importing a soothing balm from a merchant called Ali M. It's meant to stop the itching.
textByHashes.968f4e7739865ea4973f68417ef9d977f5ca9b9b: Not even remotely, but it sure does keep the flies away.
textByHashes.0a223c08eb280f36467db7c81e54bbc784cee179: Much better now that we've finally got rid of those spots.
textByHashes.56c5a3a05966dbda6cd4c68040084b6e8478c704: What? You intolerable, insufferable idiot. That won't work! I would say get out of my sight but that's not far enough away!
textByHashes.a6c0b66b358e9e61358fad1d09dbd3861e8240c2: Clear off before I give you something to feel sorry about!
